name: Notion
description: Read and write Notion pages and databases via Notion's hosted MCP server.

tools_summary.description: Search for pages and databases in Notion

tools_summary.name: notion_read_page
tools_summary.description: Read the content of a Notion page

tools_summary.name: notion_query_database
tools_summary.description: Query a Notion database with filters

tools_summary.name: notion_create_database_item
tools_summary.description: Add a new item to a Notion database

tools_summary.name: notion_add_comment
tools_summary.description: Add a comment to a Notion page
